  • AlertConfig

Interface AlertConfig

Represents the configuration for the alert bar displayed on top of the header widget.

interface AlertConfig {
    enabled: boolean;
    message: string;
    modifier: AlertModifier;
}
  • Defined in global-header-types/src/alert.ts:6
Index

Properties

enabled message modifier

Properties

enabled

enabled: boolean

Shows or hides the alert bar on top of the header widget.

  • Defined in global-header-types/src/alert.ts:10

message

message: string

The content of the alert. This can be an HTML string.

  • Defined in global-header-types/src/alert.ts:15

modifier

modifier: AlertModifier

Changes the icon and color of the alert.

  • Defined in global-header-types/src/alert.ts:20
